girls_count.description: Number of girls in the class, used to compute the combination C(10,3).

boys_count.description: Number of boys in the class, used to compute the combination C(12,3).

total_children.description: Total number of children in the class (10+12=22), used to compute the combination C(22,6).

sample_size.description: Number of children selected at random by the teacher for group projects.

girls_selected.description: Number of girls to be chosen in the scenario of interest (3 girls and 3 boys).

boys_selected.description: Number of boys to be chosen in the scenario of interest (3 girls and 3 boys).
